entries.title: Snowflake Commits $6 Billion to AWS For Global AI Expansion
entries.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) data cloud company Snowflake has made a $6 billion multiyear infrastructure commitment to AWS as part of a new strategic collaboration agreement between the two companies. With this agreement, the companies aim to accelerate enterprise agentic AI adoption by helping their joint customers around the world build and deploy AI, Snowflake said in a Wednesday (May 27) press

entries.title: Meta Begins Rollout of Subscription Plans for Apps and AI
entries.summary: Meta will soon roll out subscriptions for three of its apps and for creators, businesses and power users of its artificial intelligence (AI) offering. Subscription plans called Instagram Plus, WhatsApp Plus and Facebook Plus are rolling out globally, Meta Head of Product Naomi Gleit said in a Wednesday (May 27) post on Instagram. “These subscription plans offer richer ways to express […] The

entries.title: Cognition Raises $1 Billion to Expand AI-Powered Software Engineer
entries.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) startup Cognition said it is now a $26 billion company. As the company said in its announcement Wednesday (May 27), Cognition reached that valuation after raising more than $1 billion in a new Series D funding round, financing it will use for its AI software engineer “Devin.” “We launched Devin two […] The post Cognition Raises $1 Billion to Expand AI-Powered Sof

entries.title: AI Pricing Isn’t the Enemy Consumers Think It Is
entries.summary: Regulators, retailers and consumer watchdogs have raised alarms over artificial intelligence-powered pricing systems, warning that the algorithms work against buyers. New research from the University of Pennsylvania and Rutgers Business School suggested the picture is more complicated. In many competitive markets, dynamic pricing moves prices lower, not higher. entries.title: Coinbase goes live with Base MCP
entries.summary: Base MCP is live. Connect your Base Account to your agent and use simple prompts to swap, transfer, track your portfolio, and tap into the Base Ecosystem from chat. Launching with skills for Morpho, Moonwell, Aerodrome, Bankr, Avantis, Virtuals, and Uniswap, with more on the way.

entries.title: Mastercard secures New York BitLicense
entries.summary: Mastercard Transaction Services has been granted a BitLicense by the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS), cementing its support for digital currencies such as stablecoins and tokenized deposits

entries.title: Tokenisation can improve wholesale cross-border payments - BIS project
entries.summary: A long-running project involving several central banks and a host of private sector players has built a prototype demonstrating that tokenisation can tackle inefficiencies in wholesale cross-border payments.

entries.title: Farsight launches AI agent for client-ready deal materials
entries.summary: Farsight, an institutional AI platform for financial services, has launched an agent designed to produce client-ready deck materials from a single prompt.

entries.title: Fold rolls out bitcoin rewards credit card
entries.summary: Fold Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLD) (“Fold” or the “Company”), a bitcoin financial services company making it easy for individuals to earn, save and spend bitcoin through everyday financial tools, announced it has begun rolling out the Fold Bitcoin Credit Card to a portion of the waitlist members.

entries.title: Sella becomes first bank in Italy to get permission to set up crypto-asset services
entries.summary: Banca Sella has completed the process of notification to the Bank of Italy as set out in the European MiCA (Markets in Crypto-Assets) Regulation and is the first bank in Italy to be authorized to offer crypto-asset services, relating in particular to the custody and transfer of digital assets.

entries.title: Nium joins Circle Payments network
entries.summary: Nium, the global leader in real-time cross-border payments infrastructure, and Circle Technology Services, LLC, an affiliate of Circle Internet Group, Inc. (NYSE: CRCL) ('Circle') and operator of Circle Payments Network (CPN), today announced a partnership to connect stablecoin settlement with last-mile global payouts.

entries.title: Robinhood customers can now let AI agents make trades and credit card purchases
entries.summary: Robinhood customers can now enable their AI agents to make payments and trade stocks on their behalf.

entries.title: SoFi adds USD sablecoin to banking app
entries.summary: SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI), a member-centric, everything app for digital financial services, announced today that SoFiUSD, a bank-issued U.S. dollar stablecoin, is available for SoFi members to buy, sell, hold, and convert directly within the SoFi app.

entries.title: Interac deepens verification capabilities with Incode
entries.summary: Interac Corp. (Interac) today announced a collaboration with Incode Technologies, Inc. – a global leader in identity security and fraud prevention – to add advanced capabilities to Interac Verified solutions.

entries.title: Fintech Sandbox appoints former LSEG and FactSet exec as director of data partnerships
entries.summary: Fintech Sandbox, the nonprofit providing early‑stage fintech startups with free access to critical datasets and infrastructure, today announced the appointment of Rick Barrett as Director of Data Partnerships.
